description: A satellite must be subjected to intense vibrations on a shaker table to ensure it can survive the violent forces of a rocket launch.

nodes.task_description: Mount the satellite onto the shaker table.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures the satellite is securely mounted.

nodes.task_description: Run the shaker table through a vibration profile that simulates the launch environment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent operates the shaker table according to the test plan.

nodes.task_description: After the test, perform a full functional check on the satellite to verify that no components were damaged.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a functional test and confirms the satellite is still fully operational.
